examples: I laughed my head off when I heard of his discomfiture.
He was really not masterful enough mentally, and he had witnessed her discomfiture.
To court their own discomfiture by love is a common instinct with certain perfervid women.
One minister, Home Secretary Theresa May, will probably be looking at the SFO's discomfiture with mixed emotions.
Yet nobody has seized the opportunity afforded by Mr Trichet's discomfiture to put forward a strong candidate of their own.
